form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Mister Anatoly at this track last start over 401m (23.17). Likely to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Mister Anatoly at this track last start over 401m (23.17). Likely to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn to the home straight and came together.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 401m at this track behind Shake Not Stir beaten 10 lengths (23.50). Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 401m at this track behind Shake Not Stir beaten 10 lengths (23.50). Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together passing the catching pen and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Going well prior to missing the frame last start when well-fancied, finishing fourth in 23.35 over 401m at this track. Forgive that last start failure.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Going well prior to missing the frame last start when well-fancied, finishing fourth in 23.35 over 401m at this track. Forgive that last start failure.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Looks outclassed here.

formComments.comment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Looks outclassed here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked nearing the 150m and momentarily stumbled.
Rounding the home turn galloped on from behind.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 320m (18.34) beating Anjo Ruby in Grade 5 on April 8. Strong form emerging from the last run. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 320m (18.34) beating Anjo Ruby in Grade 5 on April 8. Strong form emerging from the last run. Looks one of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Struck the running rail end of the back straight.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 320m (18.33) beating Daltry in Maiden on April 12. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 320m (18.33) beating Daltry in Maiden on April 12. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 150m mark hampered and came together.
Came together in the first turn, became awkward in action and lost ground.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when second (23.18) over 401m at this track. Drawn out wide but in the mix on his best form.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 401m. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 14 over 340m at Bulli in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.
